---
title: "Mercer Island, Washington Rate Setting"
year: 1
image: /images/mercer_WA.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Mercer Island, Washington"
categories: ["Rate Setting"]
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}
Bell & Associates  assisted the City of Mercer Island during the contract
negotiations with Allied Waste of Bellevue. Part of the process was reviewing
the additional costs associated with program changes and service enhancements
and the impact on collection rates over the initial ten year term of the
contract.

[By Dllu - Own work, CC BY-SA 4.0](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=42654839)
:::
